alignments.json_text: Do you have any book, Peacock Bowel there, sir?
alignments.wiki_text: Uhhh... Do you have any, uh... bulk, uh... peacock bowel there, sir?
alignments.proposed_text: Uhhh... Do you have any, uh... bulk, uh... peacock bowel there, sir?

alignments.json_text: We got one on the telephone right now. That'd be you.
alignments.wiki_text: Ehhhh, we've got one on the telephone right now, that'd be you.
alignments.proposed_text: Ehhhh, we've got one on the telephone right now, that'd be you.

alignments.json_text: Oh, I don't...
alignments.wiki_text: Well, I don't--
alignments.proposed_text: Well, I don't--

alignments.json_text: Let's on a minute, because I could barely hear you now.
alignments.wiki_text: Hold on a minute, 'cause I can barely hear you. Now start over. What... What do you have for us?
alignments.proposed_text: Let's on a minute, because I could barely hear you now.

alignments.json_text: Start over. What do you have for us?
alignments.wiki_text: Hold on a minute, 'cause I can barely hear you. Now start over. What... What do you have for us?
alignments.proposed_text: Start over. What do you have for us?

alignments.json_text: You ordered a Siamese peacock bowel?
alignments.wiki_text: You ordered a Siamese peacock bowel.
alignments.proposed_text: You ordered a Siamese peacock bowel?

alignments.json_text: Not here.
alignments.wiki_text: Uh, not here.
alignments.proposed_text: Uh, not here.

alignments.json_text: From Siam? Yeah.
alignments.wiki_text: From Siam... Yeah.
alignments.proposed_text: From Siam? Yeah.

alignments.json_text: Bring it now. And if we don't like it, we'll send it back.
alignments.wiki_text: Bring it now. And if we don't like it, we'll send it back.
alignments.proposed_text: Bring it now. And if we don't like it, we'll send it back.

alignments.json_text: You will pay for it in cash?
alignments.wiki_text: You will pay for it in cash.
alignments.proposed_text: You will pay for it in cash?

alignments.json_text: No, we will not.
alignments.wiki_text: No, we will not!
alignments.proposed_text: No, we will not.

alignments.json_text: You know.
alignments.wiki_text: You know, sir--
alignments.proposed_text: You know, sir--

alignments.json_text: We'll show us what we'll do. We'll do what we want to do.
alignments.wiki_text: Don't tell us what we'll do. We'll do what we wanna do. It's our business. We don't have to accept anything.
alignments.proposed_text: We'll show us what we'll do. We'll do what we want to do.

alignments.json_text: It's our business. We don't have a business. We don't have it.
alignments.wiki_text: Don't tell us what we'll do. We'll do what we wanna do. It's our business. We don't have to accept anything.
alignments.proposed_text: It's our business. We don't have a business. We don't have it.

alignments.json_text: to accept anything. Why do you want to even bother to talk to us like that?
alignments.wiki_text: Why... Why do you wanna even bother talking to us like that?
alignments.proposed_text: Why... Why do you wanna even bother talking to us like that?

alignments.json_text: We don't even know what a Siamese peacock bow is. The only bow I know is you.
alignments.wiki_text: I don't even know what a Siamese... peacock bowel is. The only bowel I know is you.
alignments.proposed_text: I don't even know what a Siamese... peacock bowel is. The only bowel I know is you.

alignments.json_text: Look, I don't have to play these games. When is the best time?
alignments.wiki_text: Look, I don't have to play these games. When is the best time--
alignments.proposed_text: Look, I don't have to play these games. When is the best time?

alignments.json_text: I don't either. And I'm getting sick and tired of playing these games, right?
alignments.wiki_text: I don't either. And I'm getting sick and tired of playing these games, right? If you wanna be here in ten minutes, be here in ten minutes. The shipment can come in ten minutes. And if you can be here in ten minutes, I'd like you to.
alignments.proposed_text: I don't either. And I'm getting sick and tired of playing these games, right?

alignments.json_text: If you want to be here in 10 minutes, be here in 10 minutes. The shipment can come in 10 minutes.
alignments.wiki_text: I don't either. And I'm getting sick and tired of playing these games, right? If you wanna be here in ten minutes, be here in ten minutes. The shipment can come in ten minutes. And if you can be here in ten minutes, I'd like you to.
alignments.proposed_text: If you want to be here in 10 minutes, be here in 10 minutes. The shipment can come in 10 minutes.

alignments.json_text: And if you can be here in 10 minutes, I'd like you to.
alignments.wiki_text: I don't either. And I'm getting sick and tired of playing these games, right? If you wanna be here in ten minutes, be here in ten minutes. The shipment can come in ten minutes. And if you can be here in ten minutes, I'd like you to.
alignments.proposed_text: And if you can be here in 10 minutes, I'd like you to.

alignments.json_text: How would if I punch you in 10 minutes?
alignments.wiki_text: How about if I punched you in ten minutes?
alignments.proposed_text: How about if I punched you in ten minutes?

alignments.json_text: I'd like to see you punch me in 10 minutes.
alignments.wiki_text: I... I'd like to see you try to punch me in ten minutes.
alignments.proposed_text: I... I'd like to see you try to punch me in ten minutes.

alignments.json_text: How? You ordered a lesbian.
alignments.wiki_text: How... You... You ordered a lesbian.
alignments.proposed_text: How... You... You ordered a lesbian.

alignments.json_text: You are.
alignments.wiki_text: You are.
alignments.proposed_text: You are.

alignments.json_text: What? You are, aren't you?
alignments.wiki_text: You are, aren't ya?
alignments.proposed_text: You are, aren't ya?

alignments.json_text: What?
alignments.wiki_text: What?
alignments.proposed_text: What?

alignments.json_text: A lesbian.
alignments.wiki_text: A lesbian.
alignments.proposed_text: A lesbian.

alignments.json_text: You got to say.
alignments.proposed_text: You got to say.

alignments.json_text: Because if he comes over here, I'm going to grind him up in his office.
alignments.wiki_text: [to other people in the background] He called me a f--. Because if he comes over here I'm gonna grind him up into sausage! 'Cause when I knock him down, they won't find him.
